sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109049" key="u(po/rqrios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπόρθ-ριος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n109049.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">towards morning, early,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φωναὶ [τῆς χελιδόνος]</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Anacreont.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
